title: convolvulus schulzei
intro: Convolvulus schulzei, also known as Schulze's morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the bindweed family Convolvulaceae, native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus schulzei include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aiding in wound healing. Convolvulus schulzei can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
